name: Peanut Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Good stock (preferably made from chicken carcass with one onion)
recipeInstructions: This recipe is from an old book intended for British settlers in Nyasaland, Africa. Dry the peanuts in the oven until their skins can be easily rubbed off and they are a deep biscuit color. Crush them finely using a rolling pin or mince them into a very fine meal. Strain the stock and simmer with the nut meal for at least 30 minutes. Season to taste. Before serving, stir in milk or up to half a small tin of unsweetened condensed milk, add a little butter, and serve.
